# orcasecurity_admission_controller_template (Data Source)

Looks up an Admission Controller control template by name or display name. Use its `id` as the `template_id` of an `orcasecurity_admission_controller_control` resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `display_name` (String) Template display name as shown in the Orca UI (e.g. `Allowed Container Registries`). Exactly one of `name` and `display_name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Template internal name (e.g. `k8sallowedrepos`). Exactly one of `name` and `display_name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `controller_type` (String) Controller type: `gatekeeper` or `kyverno`.
- `description` (String) Template description.
- `id` (String) Template ID.
- `source` (String) Template source: `internal` or `custom`.
- `supported_kinds` (List of String) Kubernetes resource kinds this template supports (valid values for the control's `cluster_scope.kinds[].kinds`).
- `version` (String) Template version.
